messages.content: Extract lung-cancer MDT registry fields from the note. Return only valid JSON. Fields: mdt_discussed, ecog_ps, tnm. If a field is not explicitly supported by the note, return value null and set requires_review=true. Each field carries its verbatim in-note evidence.

NOTE:
Potilas käsitelty MDT:ssä. ECOG 1. PET-TT:n perusteella cT2aN1M0.

Extract lung-cancer MDT registry fields from the note. Return only valid JSON. Fields: mdt_discussed, ecog_ps, tnm. If a field is not explicitly supported by the note, return value null and set requires_review=true. Each field carries its verbatim in-note evidence.

NOTE:
Lungcancer-MDK planeras nästa vecka. Tidigare cT3 N1, ny stadieindelning ej klar.

{"mdt_discussed": {"value": null, "evidence": null, "requires_review": true}, "ecog_ps": {"value": null, "evidence": null, "requires_review": true}, "tnm": {"value": null, "components": {"prefix": "unknown", "t": "T3", "n": "N1", "m": null}, "evidence": "cT3 N1", "requires_review": true}}
